name: Standard/Queen Medium/Firm Wool Blend Bed Pillow - Casaluna™: Hypoallergenic, 250 Thread Count, OEKO-TEX Certified
description:
Finish off the calm, comforting oasis of your bed with a wool-blend bed pillow from Casaluna™. This standard-size bed pillow features medium/firm fill density for a great blend of softness and support that's suitable for all sleep styles. The 100% cotton cover gives it a soft, breathable feel for comfortable sleeping throughout the seasons, and it's easy to slip into your choice of standard size pillowcases to create the perfect look for your space.

This is your invitation to create a space that’s just for you. Make room to relax with Casaluna, where calm and comfort are naturally at home.

Tested for harmful substances and produced sustainably in accordance with OEKO-TEX® guidelines.
